inputs.text: A stunning Korean idol-style woman with chestnut brown textured shag cut, heart-shaped face and full lips, elegant sophisticated expression. She wears a sharply tailored charcoal power suit with structured shoulders, standing in an autumn park as golden and crimson leaves drift around her. Shot on 135mm telephoto with compressed background of blurred amber foliage. Silhouette against golden hour light source, warm side light catching the edges of her hair and jawline, casting a luminous glow across flawless porcelain skin. Medium shot capturing the park environment, one hand lightly adjusting her lapel. Styled dewy makeup with soft berry lip, subtle smoky eyes. Bold vivid chromatic tones, fashion editorial atmosphere, cinematic depth.
lowres, deformed, blurry, watermark, ugly, low quality
